description: A Medical and Health Services Manager has onboarded two new clinical support staff into OrangeHRM. Their personal records already exist in the PIM, but they still need Employee Self-Service (ESS) login accounts so they can access the self-service portal. Create two ESS user accounts with the following details: For Lisa Andrews, set the User Role to ESS, Status to Enabled, Username to lisa.andrews, and Password to EssUser@2024!. For David Morris, set the User Role to ESS, Status to Enabled, Username to david.morris, and Password to EssUser@2024!.
